Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $16,379,582Details
International Box Office $4,476,064
Worldwide Box Office $20,855,646
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $9,279,933
Total $9,279,933

Opening Weekend:$7,818,239 (47.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.10 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:78.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Theater counts:2,835 opening theaters/2,836 max. theaters, 2.8 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $28,473,806

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: January 19th, 2007 (Wide) by Focus Features
Video Release: May 1st, 2007 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, terror and language.
Running Time: 84 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Remake
Plot point: Falsely Accused, Familicide, Framed, Road Trip, Serial Killer, Sex Crimes
Subgenre: Slasher Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
